narrative: Consolidated all previous ledger notes into a single file while expanding the LangGraph example to stream LLM tokens. Documentation highlights the new streaming behavior. This unifies the project history and pushes implementation forward with real-time graph output.
user_input: keep advancing in the implementation, consolidate your ledgers into 1
scene_before: Multiple ledger files tracked incremental steps, and the LangGraph example only printed a final response.
scene_after: A single ledger narrates the entire setup and the example now streams tokens live, showcasing LangGraph's event flow.
